_description: Tier-up guidance and automated fields paraphrased from Scion 2e PDFs; always confirm details at the table.

mortal.source: Scion: Hero — Visitation for pre-Visitation Scions (p. 172); Callings/Knacks (p. 184), Birthrights (p. 186), Purviews (p. 188), Boons (p. 189); Legend per table (p. 172).
checklist: Choose two additional Callings so the character now possesses a total of three Callings (pre-Visitation Scions start with only one active Calling from their divine patron’s favored list).
Assign four additional dots to the Callings for a new total of five dots distributed among the three Callings (each Calling must still have at least one dot).

The character now gains full access to Heroic Knacks. Each additional dot you gain in any Calling allows you to purchase and know one additional Knack from that specific Calling. You may never have more Knacks known than your total Calling dots across all three Callings.
At least one Calling must be one of your divine parent’s three Favored Callings (Hero pp. 172, 184).
If your Scion already knows more than five Knacks (excluding Finishing Touches), take no further Knacks here (Hero p. 172).
Spend up to seven dots of Birthrights in total (Hero p. 186); if you already spent some, spend the remainder now (p. 172).
Choose innate Purviews (Hero Step 7, p. 188).
Assign Boons (Hero Step 8, p. 189).
Set Legend in the app header when your chronicle calls for it (p. 172).

Mythos pantheon (Masks of the Mythos): this app ships MotM patrons, virtues (Humanity / Nihilism), Signature Purview Arcane Calculus, and MotM Calling names in data — still use the book for Knacks/Boons tables, relics, Fatebindings, and other MotM-only rules when you advance.

Companion pantheons (Mysteries of the World): Loa of Haiti, Nemetondevos of Gaul, and Yazata of Persia—including patrons, virtues, and Signature Purviews Nemeton and Asha—are in data; use the PDF for Cults, Druid Path details, Covenant, and full Signature Boon write-ups.

Titan-blooded Scions: pick the Welcome tier **Titanic Scion** (or your Storyguide’s equivalent) instead of Hero when using Titans Rising + Saints & Monsters; on Paths set **Patron type** to **Titan** and choose a Titan from data/titans.json (Titanomachy patrons).

hero.source: Scion: Demigod — Second Visitation / Apotheosis roadmap (e.g. pp. 16, 132); Legend milestones and Demigod traits are largely narrative until milestones complete (p. 16: until the first Apotheosis Milestone, many Hero vs Demigod distinctions still treat you as Hero-tier).
checklist: Legend and Calling dots continue to advance per Demigod (Legend trait effects, p. 132+): e.g. a new Boon per dot of Legend and a new Calling dot on each even-numbered Legend dot — work with your Storyguide to record what you’ve earned in play.

The first Apotheosis Milestone often culminates in Legend 5 while still using Hero-tier distinctions for some rules (Demigod p. 16); raise Legend in the header when your table agrees — this wizard does not auto-fill Legend on tier advance.
Resolve Mantles, Fatebindings, and Divine Deeds at the table (Demigod).

demigod.source: Scion: God — Apotheosis and full Godhood (core book); Legend band for Gods is typically 8–10+ (tier overview; confirm in God).
checklist: Apotheosis completes: body of ichor, Mantles, and divine identity per Scion: God and your chronicle.
Set Legend in the header to match God-tier play (often 8–10+); this wizard does not auto-fill Legend on tier advance.

sorcerer.source: Saints & Monsters ch. 3 — moving from Mortal-band to Heroic-band Sorcerer (Legend 1+): extra Working, Techniques, Paraphernalia, and Purviews.
checklist: Gain a second Working (and its inherent Technique) and assign Techniques per Legend on the Workings step (S&M p. 65).
Choose or refine your primary Source of Power (Invocation, Patronage, Prohibition, Talisman) on the Sorcerer step.
Spend up to seven dots of Paraphernalia (Birthrights) total for the Heroic band (chargen summary p. 84).
Add the Magic Purview (and other allowed Purviews) on the Purviews step; assign Boons from merged supplement data.
Set Legend on the Review sheet when your table places you at Legend 1+.
On Calling: add Visitation-style rows (three Callings, five dots) if advancing from this wizard — or start a new sheet at Heroic Sorcerer on Welcome.

sorcerer_hero.source: Saints & Monsters ch. 3 — Legend 5 milestone: a third Working; scale Paraphernalia and Marvels with Demigod-tier play.
checklist: Take a third Working and Techniques per p. 65.
Raise Legend when the chronicle agrees (typically Legend 5).
Expand Birthrights / Paraphernalia toward Demigod-scale budgets with your Storyguide.
Resolve any new Prohibition, Patron, or Talisman costs described in the PDF.

sorcerer_demigod.source: Saints & Monsters ch. 3 — Legend 9 milestone: fourth Working (four of five Workings); align God-band limits with Scion: God where needed.
checklist: Add the fourth Working when you reach Legend 9 (p. 65).
Set Legend in the header to match God-band play.
Confirm Marvel limits, Fatebindings, and Talisman rules in Saints & Monsters and God.

sorcerer_god.source: Saints & Monsters — top of the written Sorcerer ladder in this chapter; further growth is chronicle-specific.
checklist: You may know four of the five Workings; the fifth remains inaccessible without Storyguide exception (p. 65).
Record Motif, Sources of Power, and any Denizen / Saint crossover hooks at the table.

titanic.source: Saints & Monsters — Titanic Apotheosis typically aligns with moving into Demigod-scale play; confirm milestones with your Storyguide.
checklist: Resolve Maelstrom Heart / Epicenter suppression and Collateral (or Tension alternate) per PDF.
Update Calling dots, Knacks, Purviews, and Birthrights for Demigod when your table advances you.
Raise Legend in the header when your chronicle agrees.
